name: wc3-object-porter
description: Port Warcraft III custom objects (units, items, abilities, buffs, upgrades, doodads, destructibles) between maps safely: reads maps read-only and emits a .w3o + asset drop that the World Editor imports with its own code.

scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run bundle && pkg build/cli.bundle.cjs -t node22-win-x64 -o release/wc3-porter.exe
